items.title: Canada Gives U.S. Arms Makers the Cold Shoulder on Military Spending
items.description: Canada plans to unveil a new strategy that will shift its current reliance on American companies to Canadian military suppliers.

items.title: Winter Storms Could Bring 8 Feet of Snow to Parts of California
items.description: The greatest impact is expected across Northern California, where a pair of powerful storms are expected to begin on Sunday night and last into the we...

items.title: Europe Today Looks Different From the One Trump’s Team Describes
items.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio appealed to European leaders in Munich by stressing Christian and cultural bonds that are no longer universal.

items.title: Trump Administration Ends Credit for Start-Stop Feature in Cars
items.description: Manufacturers will no longer get a credit toward vehicle emissions standards by installing engines that automatically stop at red lights.

items.title: Like Trump, U.S. Embassies Are Raising Cash for Lavish July Fourth Parties
